description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push to main and develop branches and on pull requests. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to test on multiple environments, including Ubuntu 22.04 and 24.04, and macOS 13, with various GCC versions, Python versions, and CASTXML configurations. For each matrix entry, check out the code, set up Python, display the Python version, install test libraries, run pycodestyle, set up CASTXML if necessary, and run tests with pytest.
